predeclared: 2026-06-09, ledger v3 (Exp 53). One change from v2: favorite constancy is a state-conditional invariant, enabled only when entrenchment exceeds the epoch noise margin (gap_share > 0.03).

conviction_drift.formula: center = (eq_share - cur_share) * steps/(total_counts + steps); band = center +/- 0.015

favorite_changed.conditional: scored only if pre-epoch gap_share = (counts[favorite]-counts[runner_up])/total > 0.03; else DISABLED (favorite identity is inside the epoch noise envelope, Exp 52 diagnosis)
